data.body: REVIEW CYCLE 3 (faithful: agentic Pass-1 routing fixed) on epic 5fd2. PROCESS VALIDATED: DET pass; Pass-1 31 findings (4 ST chunks + 10 agentic finders, 3 agentic); Pass-2 BATCHED 31/31 (vs prior 44->0); Pass-3 10 dropped/21 advisory/0 block, clean confidence gradient; FP filter worked (dropped the child-truncation artifact at conf 0.07). VALID FINDINGS: T8(agentic,CRITICAL) exec=DET has no execution path (real-ish: DET P1-P7 are a separate code tier run via check-ac/clarity, not in criteria_v8 — make the DET exec path explicit); T9 claim-path check-then-act TOCTOU (real); G3 COVERAGE GAPS — parent ACs I added this session (E2E proving-check, instrumentation/logging, config-preference, feedback-authoring/coaching) have NO covering child (real; next decomposition must add owners); T5a/T5b agentic-fan-out concurrency/rate-limit + reviewer-LLM retry/backoff unspecified (real); version drift v5/v8 (recurring). FIXED: child-excerpt truncation 1100->4000 (the truncated-AC FP); v5 reconciliation marked historical. NOTED for next decomposition/brainstorm: G3 coverage owners, T9 TOCTOU on claim, T5a/b concurrency, T8 DET-exec-path explicitness. Committed.
